title: Meetings of board
doc_html:
§2030.  Meetings of board

The board shall meet quarterly.  A special meeting shall be called on forty-eight hours' notice by the president at the request of any three members.
doc_text:
§2030.  Meetings of board
The board shall meet quarterly.  A special meeting shall be called on forty-eight hours' notice by the president at the request of any three members.
